excerpt: "Inter scintilla in ritiro con i giovani, Torino accoglie Casadei. Santini analizza i movimenti del mercato, Benassi punta su talenti italiani all'estero."
excerptEn: "Inter sparkles in training with youngsters, Torino welcomes Casadei. Santini analyzes market moves, Benassi bets on Italian talents abroad."

players: ["Mattia Mosconi", "Jamal Iddrissou", "Marco Palestra", "Seydou Fini", "Mattia Marello", "Cesare Casadei", "Alessio Cacciamani", "Wisdom Amey"]
competitions: []
source: "Taccuino da 5 fonti"

---

Mentre l'Italia si prepara ai Mondiali 2030, il vivaio nerazzurro continua a brillare: ecco le pillole della giornata.

**Topalovic, Iddrissou e Mosconi**
L'Inter mette in mostra il suo patrimonio giovanile con uno show convincente: tre reti e prestazioni di spessore dagli attuali ragazzi di Chivu, che potrebbero diventare risorse preziose nel progetto azzurro dei prossimi anni. [fonte](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxOWjZWbzlhSGxFSjRLT0RXTkY0UjJ3Rm1RVk91ZjBWYkxKX0ZXYUxoU09SN3M1dVdPeHdBZUh6LVVQQWVjMVpnTk4yVnBJZVU2N0V5bHk4bnlaRHA5dFRfdHo2UzJTM2YwWkZqY2gzd2RyOHBZdVNQSFAyenJlMHRYSE4wbUVaRUg5YkgxMHdTRjktSDF5Y0RnRVRn?oc=5)

**Marco Palestra**
Santini accende il dibattito sul mercato italiano: il giovane talento e i suoi coetanei rimangono al centro delle valutazioni per il progetto del calcio azzurro che guarda al 2030. [fonte](https://news.google.?oc=5)

**Mattia Mosconi**
Chivu continua a valorizzare il giovane centrale e i compagni in ritiro: il tecnico nerazzurro crede nei prospetti azzurri e li sta preparando per il salto di qualità verso il progetto mondiale. [fonte](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxNVFAwc3VxUjFYNXFSRGttejVHcEF0SFZIeTNIdTNPUDUtNkk5OU9FMmNLMU1kZ3g2VkxJM3AzOUVNZU1PV2xnVWhPTGRacU1HUUgtNjY5V1E0MUM4SU5nQm95Rloycjc2Y0lFUmgxb0FKNGNrWExuSzhEQ1dUZmpJYzZHUWhET19YLXZ5M2lTZHY?oc=5)

**Cesare Casadei**
Il giovane regista approda al Torino con i primi scatti ufficiali in maglia granata: un trasferimento che lo avvicina al progetto italiano con una piazza che crede nei talenti emergenti. [fonte](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxOc19jWC1VV1BRZE5HTk9pTlh2by1ZNVlseEZvTF82RW9GSWliRUtvUU56WnQ0VmlMSEhQY0M2YUc1b2t1azI2U3dRZUUyUWF3c1cycDViNHF4bGNuT1F4MHRJX0dmaHV2V3haWmd6Wkx2WkcwQTRCbEpqVm5hVWVjYXlNdTZQanhnc0R1V2NOcWttSWlTUkE?oc=5)

**Wisdom Amey**
Benassi, CEO italiano del Deportivo, guarda ai talenti del nostro vivaio per costruire un progetto ambizioso: una finestra europea per i giovani azzurri in cerca di continuità verso i Mondiali 2030. [fonte](https://news.google.?oc=5)

<!--EN-->

As Italy prepares for the 2030 World Cup, the Inter academy continues to shine: here are today's highlights.

**Topalovic, Iddrissou and Mosconi**
Inter showcases its youth talent with a convincing display: three goals and strong performances from Chivu's current prospects, who could become valuable assets in Italy's 2030 project. [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxOWjZWbzlhSGxFSjRLT0RXTkY0UjJ3Rm1RVk91ZjBWYkxKX0ZXYUxoU09SN3M1dVdPeHdBZUh6LVVQQWVjMVpnTk4yVnBJZVU2N0V5bHk4bnlaRHA5dFRfdHo2UzJTM2YwWkZqY2gzd2RyOHBZdVNQSFAyenJlMHRYSE4wbUVaRUg5YkgxMHdTRjktSDF5Y0RnRVRn?oc=5)

**Marco Palestra**
Santini sparks debate on the Italian market: the young talent and his peers remain central to evaluations for the Azzurri's 2030 project. [source](https://news.google.?oc=5)

**Mattia Mosconi**
Chivu continues to develop the young defender and his teammates in training: the Inter coach believes in the Azzurri prospects and is preparing them for the step toward the World Cup project. [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxNVFAwc3VxUjFYNXFSRGttejVHcEF0SFZIeTNIdTNPUDUtNkk5OU9FMmNLMU1kZ3g2VkxJM3AzOUVNZU1PV2xnVWhPTGRacU1HUUgtNjY5V1E0MUM4SU5nQm95Rloycjc2Y0lFUmgxb0FKNGNrWExuSzhEQ1dUZmpJYzZHUWhET19YLXZ5M2lTZHY?oc=5)

**Cesare Casadei**
The young midfielder joins Torino with his first official shots in granata: a transfer that brings him closer to the Italian project with a club that believes in emerging talents. [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxOc19jWC1VV1BRZE5HTk9pTlh2by1ZNVlseEZvTF82RW9GSWliRUtvUU56WnQ0VmlMSEhQY0M2YUc1b2t1azI2U3dRZUUyUWF3c1cycDViNHF4bGNuT1F4MHRJX0dmaHV2V3haWmd6Wkx2WkcwQTRCbEpqVm5hVWVjYXlNdTZQanhnc0R1V2NOcWttSWlTUkE?oc=5)

**Wisdom Amey**
Benassi, Italian CEO of Deportivo, looks to our academy talents to build an ambitious project: a European window for young Azzurri seeking continuity toward 2030. [source](https://news.google.?oc=5)
